items.gloss: angle; square; cube; bishop; third degree (of the Japanese and Chinese pentatonic scale); Chinese "horn" constellation (one of the 28 mansions); jiao (monetary unit of China; one-tenth of a yuan)
corner; edge; (street) corner; turning; rough edges (of one's character, words, etc.); abrasiveness; harshness; sharpness
horn; antler; antenna; feeler; tentacle (e.g. of a snail); horn-like projection (e.g. peaks of whipped cream)
corner; nook; recess; downstage right (on a noh stage)
